title: (Reupload) Closing Logo Collab
description:
This collaboration was about making mash ups of logos appearing before or after TV shows or VHS movies.

The collaboration was led by magmalord4. It was actually finished and posted on his channel, but his brother deleted the collaboration video along with the other stuff for no known reason. Now, here it is again! There's of course a part 2 with more collaboration entries, which is there posted by MountainDewMaNN: http://youtu.be/IiBl9unm_2Q

Participants (for this part):

1. Sonicorbit01
2. HarvestmanMan
3. me
4. app129alt
5. Justinw1134
6. Mudkiprules4
7. thedeadhalo
8. magmalord4
